issue_title: [Bug]: Vite doesn't resolve CSS fonts correctly on custom pages added via an integration
issue_body_preview:
### What happened?

When adding a custom route via an Astro Integration (that has been added via a plugin), Vite doesn't process fonts imported in CSS files correctly. An example of this can be seen when using the DashboardLayout exported from `studiocms/layouts/dashboard/Layout.astro`

### Package
test_description_zh: 通过 Astro 集成添加一个自定义页面，该页面使用 studiocms 导出的 DashboardLayout 布局组件，并在 CSS 中引用了自定义字体。构建并访问该自定义页面，检查页面中文字是否正确加载并渲染了 CSS 中指定的字体。
expected_result_zh: 自定义页面中的文字应正确加载并显示 CSS 中定义的字体，字体文件能被 Vite 正确解析，不出现字体加载失败或回退到默认字体的情况。
